parts.text: I’d like to know if I can finance accessories along with my new phone.
I want to know if my next bill includes my phone financing charges.
Please help me verify if my new phone is under a financing contract.
I want to see if there’s a financing promotion available for my upgrade.
How does financing work if I want to get a second device?
I’m trying to understand my financing options before upgrading my phone.
I’d like to make a lump-sum payment toward my financed device.
Can you tell me what my remaining term is on my device financing?
I need information about my phone’s financing or installment plan.
Please transfer me to someone who can review my device financing details.
I want to see if I can trade in my phone while still on financing.
Can you tell me when my device financing will be fully paid off?
I’d like to change the payment method linked to my device financing plan.
I’m calling to discuss my device financing agreement and balance.
Can I finance multiple devices on the same account?
I want to know how to pay off my device financing early.
I’d like to review the payment terms for financing a phone.
I want to finance a new device instead of paying the full price upfront.
Can you confirm if I’m eligible for financing another phone
right
now?
I’d like to upgrade my phone, but I’m still paying off my current device.
Please tell me how much I still owe on my device installment plan.
I want to check the remaining balance on my financed phone.
Can you explain how the device financing program works?
I’d like to know if I can finance a new phone on my current account.
